title: Smoky Creamy Masarepa Stir-fry
description: A comforting Uruguayan dish featuring yellow masarepa that is kneaded and served with a creamy sauce infused with smokiness. High-protein-friendly, perfect for those seeking a hearty meal option.

ingredients.name: Chopped Bell Pepper
ingredients.amount: 1 small, green or red, thinly sliced

ingredients.name: Salt and Black Pepper to taste

instructions: Grease a baking dish with olive oil and sprinkle masarepa on the bottom.

Combine onion, garlic, and bell pepper in a bowl. Mix well with sour cream, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper. Add tomato sauce until you reach your desired consistency for filling the masarepa pockets.
Divide the filling evenly among 4 prepared masarepa discs, packing them tightly to form small packets (around 1-inch diameter). Place the filled masarepas in the baking dish.
Pour the remaining sauce over the top of the masarepas. Bake for about 25 minutes until fully cooked and golden brown.
Garnish with extra cilantro if desired.
